title: agrostis lanceolata
intro: Agrostis lanceolata, also known as green bent or lance-leaved bentgrass, is a species of grass that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Agrostis lanceolata include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Agrostis lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies for skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
